description_long: This picnic table is constructed from dark brown wooden planks, featuring a rectangular tabletop supported by a robust frame. The tabletop consists of several evenly spaced wooden slats running lengthwise, providing a classic and rustic appearance. Two long benches, also made from matching wooden slats, are attached parallel to the longer sides of the table, offering ample seating. The supporting structure includes diagonal braces and sturdy legs, ensuring stability and durability for outdoor use. The wood grain is visible throughout, giving the table a natural and textured look. There is no visible hole in the center of the tabletop for an umbrella.
description: A sturdy, dark brown wooden picnic table with two attached benches and a slatted tabletop, designed for outdoor use. The structure features visible wood grain and strong support braces.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full width of the table and one bench, highlighting the slatted tabletop and bench surface.
description_view_1: Side view emphasizing the lengthwise slats of the tabletop and benches, as well as the diagonal support braces beneath.
description_view_2: Rear view mirroring the front, displaying the opposite bench and the even alignment of the wooden slats.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, showing the structure of the table and benches from the other side.
attribute_tabletop_support_structure: The tabletop is supported by a set of sturdy wooden legs connected by diagonal braces and crossbeams, providing stability and strength to the entire structure.
